description:
A time tracker and timesheet app that lets you track work hours across projects.


- New feature: Split time entry feature added.
- Fix: App is slow after sleep.
- Fix: 'Continue last' option on Pomodoro notification not picking the entry description.
- Fix: Added a missing space after the task name.
- Fix: Autotracker discarding or failing to capture activity during sudden network loss.
- Fix: Autotracker incorrectly displaying '.' for a item that is not being tracked currently.
- Fix: App not prioritizing the system time zone when sorting entries.
- Fix: App incorrectly showing no internet banner.
- Improvement: Fetch boot data on app startup.
- Improvement: Other bug fixes and performance improvements.
